message:
fix: strip dynamic import and Portal from War Stories page

War Stories was the ONLY page using next/dynamic with ssr:false and
a createPortal to document.body. This caused the page to fail on
client-side navigation while working on full refresh.

Changes:
- Replace dynamic(() => import(...), { ssr: false }) with direct import
  matching every other page in the project
- Remove Portal component and createPortal usage from war-stories-map
- Render the detail overlay as a plain fixed div (z-[999] already ensures
  it sits above everything)
- Remove unused useEffect and react-dom imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
